transcript: Wake up. Where am I? You know exactly where you are. I swear I don't. Just let me go. What is that? That is a Winchester Model 70. Why am I here? At least tell me that. least tell me that that i'm surprised you're not talking about the rifle pointing right at your face where are you close enough to set that rifle off now shut up sam dollaride you better listen and listen good. If you don't start talking, this good old Winchester here will put a nickel-sized hole through your nose. Understand? Mm-hmm. Good. Now tell me, where were you March 11th? Was that Friday? You tell me. If it was, then I was at a party who's kyler kyler thompson it was his party tyler now what were you doing at this skyloak thompson's party you know watching movies eating popcorn not what i heard well well what did you hear i know what you did Sam and if you don't a minute then you're gonna be partying in the great beyond my friend Who are you? You remember Rudy Tyler Here's dad damn straight. What happened to my boy? I wasn't... I didn't ask about you. I heard he got hit. By what? A car? Damn straight he was. Anything else? No, sir. Well, guess you'll be taking this with you to your grave. No! Why? I did it. It was my car. Is that what you wanted? A confession? I hit it! It was my car! Is that what you wanted? A confession? I hit your son with my damn car! Is that what you wanted? Yes it is. Thank you.
